textIntro: A product designer with 15+ years of experience in leading design initiatives across agencies, startups, and corporations. Specializing in Design Vision, Design Management, UX Research, Design Systems and Agile Methods. Passionate about creating user-centric digital products.

Pepperi.name: Pepperi
Pepperi.intro: At Pepperi, I combine both leadership and execution of product and brand design.

b1.text: Enhance UX and design to meet B2C standards, boosting Buyer role adoption and initiating our B2B eCommerce offering.

b2.text: Conduct user research and develop design strategies to streamline new product development and increase efficiency.

b3.text: Manage backlogs, coordinate with teams, clarifying goals and tracking KPIs.

b4.text: Develop a design system that increases development speed and ensures UI consistency, supporting key product features.

b5.text: Improve marketing site design, increasing user retention and lead conversions.

b6.text: Create a brand guide, strengthening brand awareness and sales efforts.

b7.text: Support for Professional Services and Native Apps Teams.

a1.text: Boost Buyer role adoption, driving B2B eCommerce growth.

a2.text: Streamline design processes for efficiency and goal achievement.

a3.text: Enhance marketing site design, improving retention and conversions.

b4.text: Strengthen brand awareness, aiding sales and credibility.

Bit.name: bit.dev
Bit.intro: Led Brand and Product Design for Bit, a B2D code management SaaS, helping developers build UI faster by reusing code components.

b1.text: Conducted user research and collaborated with product and engineering teams, creating a UX adopted by thousands globally.

b2.text: Transformed the product from CoCycles to Marvin, and finally to Bit, significantly enhancing its functionality and increasing user adoption.

b3.text: Delivered a UX that supports thousands of developers globally, streamlining their workflows.

MTNS.name: Matnas Interactive
MTNS.intro: Led a team of designers, provided mentorship, and ensured high-quality outputs. Strategized for growth, sought new business opportunities, and maintained supplier relationships. Supervised daily operations and managed numerous design projects simultaneously, achieving excellent results and high client satisfaction.

b1.text: Led and mentored a team, fostering a creative and productive environment; many team members are now leading designers.

b2.text: Managed 100K+ accounts, overseeing business operations; preparing and issuing quotes, and maintaining detailed budgeting processes.

b3.text: Implemented quality control and stayed updated with industry trends, enhancing team performance and project success.
